mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies (title, director, actors, genre, duration_minutes, release_date, poster_url, synopsis, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{director}, #{actors}, #{genre}, #{durationMinutes}, #{releaseDate}, #{posterUrl}, #{synopsis}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE movies SET title = #{title}, director = #{director}, actors = #{actors}, genre = #{genre}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, synopsis = #{synopsis}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
